name: Teriyaki Chicken Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into smaller pieces.
2. Rinse and pat dry the chicken.
3. Place the chicken in a glass bowl to marinate.
4. In a small saucepan, combine oil, honey, teriyaki sauce, ground ginger, and minced garlic.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and add sherry.
7. Pour the marinade over the chicken pieces.
8. Cover tightly and refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally.
9. Grill, beginning with the skin side down, 6 to 8 inches from coals.
10. Turn the chicken every 10 minutes and baste with the marinade.
11. Cook for 25 to 30 minutes or until done and well browned.
